name: Image Search via Unsplash Proxy
promptInjection:
CAPABILITY: Image Search via /api/proxy/images (Unsplash)

OVERVIEW:
- Generated apps can search for stock photos by keyword using the VibeTree image proxy backed by Unsplash.
- Images are hotlinked directly from Unsplash URLs — do NOT download, cache, or re-host images.
- Always show attribution: "Photo by [photographer] on Unsplash" linked to photographerUrl. This is required by Unsplash terms.
- Daily limit: 30 searches/user/day.

ENDPOINT:
  GET kApiBaseURL + "/api/proxy/images"

REQUEST HEADERS:
  X-App-Token: kAppToken

QUERY PARAMS:
  query       (required) — search term, e.g. "beach house", "coffee shop", "hiking trail"
  count       (optional, default 5, max 10) — number of photos to return
  orientation (optional) — "landscape", "portrait", or "squarish"
  userId      (required) — pass kUserId for per-user daily limit tracking

RESPONSE:
  {
    "results": [
      {
        "id": "abc123",
        "url": "https://images.unsplash.com/...",
        "thumbUrl": "https://images.unsplash.com/...&w=200",
        "smallUrl": "https://images.unsplash.com/...&w=400",
        "regularUrl": "https://images.unsplash.com/...&w=1080",
        "photographer": "John Smith",
        "photographerUrl": "https://unsplash.com/@johnsmith",
        "downloadUrl": "https://api.unsplash.com/photos/abc123/download"
      }
    ]
  }

URL USAGE GUIDE:
  - thumbUrl   → thumbnails in lists/grids (fast load)
  - smallUrl   → medium preview cards
  - regularUrl → full-screen detail view, hero images, background fills
  - url        → original full resolution (use sparingly — large file)
  - For AsyncImage, use URL(string: photo.regularUrl) for most cases

SWIFT PATTERN:

struct UnsplashPhoto: Codable, Identifiable {
    let id: String
    let url: String
    let thumbUrl: String
    let smallUrl: String
    let regularUrl: String
    let photographer: String
    let photographerUrl: String
    let downloadUrl: String
}

struct ImageSearchResponse: Codable {
    let results: [UnsplashPhoto]
}

func searchPhotos(query: String, count: Int = 5, orientation: String? = nil) async -> [UnsplashPhoto] {
    var components = URLComponents(string: kApiBaseURL + "/api/proxy/images")!
    components.queryItems = [
        URLQueryItem(name: "query", value: query),
        URLQueryItem(name: "count", value: String(count)),
        URLQueryItem(name: "userId", value: kUserId)
    ]
    if let orientation = orientation {
        components.queryItems?.append(URLQueryItem(name: "orientation", value: orientation))
    }
    guard let url = components.url else { return [] }
    var request = URLRequest(url: url)
    request.setValue(kAppToken, forHTTPHeaderField: "X-App-Token")
    do {
        let (data, _) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
        let response = try JSONDecoder().decode(ImageSearchResponse.self, from: data)
        return response.results
    } catch {
        print("Image search failed:", error)
        return []
    }
}

ATTRIBUTION (REQUIRED):

// Always include this view below or overlaid on each Unsplash photo:
struct UnsplashAttribution: View {
    let photo: UnsplashPhoto
    var body: some View {
        Link("Photo by \(photo.photographer) on Unsplash",
             destination: URL(string: photo.photographerUrl) ?? URL(string: "https://unsplash.com")!)
        .font(.caption2)
        .foregroundColor(.secondary)
    }
}

USE CASES:
- Listing/property apps: search for photos by property type ("modern kitchen", "cozy bedroom")
- Travel apps: search by destination ("paris", "hawaii beach", "mountain trail")
- Food/recipe apps: search by dish ("pasta carbonara", "avocado toast")
- Real estate: search by feature ("open floor plan", "backyard pool")
- Gallery/inspiration boards: let users search and save photos by theme
- App header/hero images: search for high-quality background images by topic

ANTI-PATTERNS:
- Do NOT use url or downloadUrl in AsyncImage — use thumbUrl, smallUrl, or regularUrl instead.
- Do NOT download or re-host images — always load via AsyncImage with the hotlink URL.
- Do NOT omit photographer attribution — it is required by Unsplash terms of service.
- Do NOT show a broken image placeholder on error — always show a fallback color/icon.
- Do NOT call the endpoint without userId — pass kUserId so daily limits are tracked properly.
antiPatterns: Downloading or re-hosting Unsplash images instead of hotlinking
Omitting photographer attribution (required by Unsplash ToS)
Using url or downloadUrl in AsyncImage instead of thumbUrl/smallUrl/regularUrl
Showing no fallback when images fail to load
